question: [File: 'File Name: rest/controllers/contractController.js -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: extractSqlFromContractFilters()] Can an unprivileged external user submit GET /api/v1/contracts with many repeated contract_id= query parameters (e.g., contract_id=0.0.1&contract_id=0.0.2&...&contract_id=0.0.N) to cause contractIdInValues to grow unboundedly, generating a massive SQL IN clause that exhausts DB query planner CPU and memory, causing sustained service unavailability?
